dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Sam, do you know what day it is next weekend?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Yes! It's our parents' anniversary. They will be married for twenty-five years.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's a special occasion. We should prepare something for them. What's your opinion?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I have an excellent idea! We can make a surprise party at home. We can invite family and someone from the community.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect! I can prepare dinner. Perhaps we can make their favorite meal with fresh tomatoes from the shop.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Good! And I will make a special cake for the occasion. We should start planning now.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Yes, we don't have much time. The party is on Saturday afternoon. We need to work quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: It's Saturday morning now. I will start the cake soon. Can you check if we have milk and eggs?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Oh no! We don't have enough milk. And I can't find the tomatoes!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Don't worry. You can get them from the shop in town. But please hurry! The guests will be here at three.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I'll take the bus there. Wait... where are my savings? I had money on my desk yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I saw it under your book this morning. Get it quickly! You're late already.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Found it! I'll be back soon. Don't drop the cake!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Very funny. Just hurry, please. We can't miss this opportunity to make it perfect for them.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I'm back! I got everything. The shop nearly shut when I got there. How is the cake?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: It's in the oven now. But Alex, I'm tired and my leg hurts from standing. Can you prepare the dinner?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Of course! I'll start now. When will our parents be home?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: They said they will be back at three. It's a quarter past two now. The guests are here!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Good timing! Everything is ready. The cake looks excellent and dinner smells good.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I can hear their car! Everyone, please be quiet. They're at the door!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Surprise! Happy anniversary! This is from me and Sam. We hope you like it.
